data.content: CONGRATULATIONS TO EVERYONE! It has been fully agreed by and between Israel and Iran that there will be a Complete and Total CEASEFIRE (in approximately 6 hours from now, when Israel and Iran have wound down and completed their in progress, final missions!), for 12 hours, at which point the War will be considered, ENDED! Officially, Iran will start the CEASEFIRE and, upon the 12th Hour, Israel will start the CEASEFIRE and, upon the 24th Hour, an Official END to THE 12 DAY WAR will be saluted by the World. During each CEASEFIRE, the other side will remain PEACEFUL and RESPECTFUL. On the assumption that everything works as it should, which it will, I would like to congratulate both Countries, Israel and Iran, on having the Stamina, Courage, and Intelligence to end, what should be called, ГўВҖВңTHE 12 DAY WAR.ГўВҖВқ This is a War that could have gone on for years, and destroyed the entire Middle East, but it didnГўВҖВҷt, and never will! I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize for this, I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize for stopping the War between India and Pakistan, I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize for stopping the War between Serbia and Kosovo, I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize for keeping Peace between Egypt and Ethiopia (A massive Ethiopian built dam, stupidly financed by the United States of America, substantially reduces the water flowing into The Nile River), and I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize for doing the Abraham Accords in the Middle East which, if all goes well, will be loaded to the brim with additional Countries signing on, and will unify the Middle East for the first time in ГўВҖВңThe Ages!ГўВҖВқ No, I wonГўВҖВҷt get a Nobel Peace Prize no matter what I do, including Russia/Ukraine, and Israel/Iran, whatever those outcomes may be, but the people know, and thatГўВҖВҷs all that matters to me!

data.content: ГўВҖВңToo LateГўВҖВқ Powell complains about costs, much of which were produced by the Biden Fake ГўВҖВңGovernment,ГўВҖВқ but he could do the biggest and best job for our Country by helping to lower Interest Rates and, if he reduced them to the number they should be, 1% to 2%, that ГўВҖВңnumbskullГўВҖВқ would be saving the United States of America up to $1 Trillion Dollars per year. I fully understand that my strong criticism of him makes it more difficult for him to do what he should be doing, lowering Rates, but IГўВҖВҷve tried it all different ways. IГўВҖВҷve been nice, IГўВҖВҷve been neutral, and IГўВҖВҷve been nasty, and nice and neutral didnГўВҖВҷt work! HeГўВҖВҷs a dumb guy, and an obvious Trump Hater, who should have never been there, I listened to someone that I shouldnГўВҖВҷt have listened to, and Biden shouldnГўВҖВҷt have reappointed him. We have virtually No Inflation, our Economy is doing really well, and will soon be doing, with the tremendous Tariff Income coming in, and Factories being built all over the Country, better than it has ever done before. If he was concerned about Inflation or anything else, then all he has to do is bring the Rate down, so we can benefit on Interest Costs, and raise it in the future when and if these ГўВҖВңother elementsГўВҖВқ happen (which I doubt they will!). Maybe, just maybe, IГўВҖВҷll have to change my mind about firing him? But regardless, his Term ends shortly!

data.content: It is my Great Honor to announce that I will be putting up two beautiful Flag Poles on both sides of the White House, North and South Lawns. It is a GIFT from me of something which was always missing from this magnificent place. The digging and placement of the poles will begin at 7:30 A.M. EST, tomorrow morning. Flags will be raised at approximately 11 A.M. EST. These are the most magnificent poles made ГўВҖВ“ They are tall, tapered, rust proof, rope inside the pole, and of the highest quality. Hopefully, they will proudly stand at both sides of the White House for many years to come!
